internal.title: Selling to Product
internal.snippet: How to position Linear when you’re talking to Product.  Linear gives Product and Engineering a shared, real-time system for planning and delivery. While both teams ultimately work toward the same outcome of building great products, their day-to-day workflows, responsibilities, and incentives differ
